task: Launch-quality advanced task: Diagnose rack-level liquid cooling loop instability using only the supplied embedded packet. Compute derived metrics and a normalized risk per the provided formula. Classify every record (pass/warn/fail) using the risk thresholds, identify the smallest defensible intervention that fits the decision budget, and produce evidence-backed rationale and validation checks. Deliver two artifacts: liquid_cooling_stability.xlsx (with formulas or executable logic) and facilities_action.md (decision rationale, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and final recommendation table). Mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review. Do not use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; all calculations must use only the embedded packet.
